entries.mcp_context:
MCP Project Context:
These project variable values are current for this chat. Use them when choosing paths, working directories, command locations, and MCP tool arguments.
- ProjectFolder: \\vanusdisk\Code\tester\\Tester_[admin]\ (description: Project Folder where the project files are located.)
entries.rag_context:
Project RAG MCP Servers:
Each RAG library below is exposed as its own MCP-style server. Use the server name and description to choose the correct RAG. When listing MCP servers, use these library names as the server names; do not call them RAG (Anonymous) or generic RAG Tools. Passive RAG retrieval is inactive in this phase; use the active RAG tools explicitly. RAG tool results may include download_url for server-hosted downloads; source_path, original_source_uri, and original file paths are provenance only and may refer to another computer, another system, or a file that no longer exists.
- MCP server: Image Sets
  RAG library id: rag_1776836047281_54
  RAG library name: Image Sets
  RAG library description: Images for Diagnostic Tests!  This RAG has a set of images that can be used for testing the system.
  Available tools: rag_search (image_sets_search_b14922ab), rag_get_document (image_sets_get_document_e661cc1b), rag_list_libraries (image_sets_list_library_cdd3968f), rag_write_document_to_drive (image_sets_write_document_213e3a49), rag_ingest_generated_document (image_sets_ingest_document_dc4a313f)

request_messages.content: Can you give me an idea of what you are capable of at this point?
Great question! Let me quickly check the project context to give you the most relevant picture.

Let's see if this works with a long day.

For me it is.
I just want to see if this one works for it now.

entries.system_prompt:
Agentic Mode Instructions (Test):
You're a testing agent. Your instructions are very clear that you must find the mistakes, in anyone's presentation.

MCP Project Context:
These project variable values are current for this chat. Use them when choosing paths, working directories, command locations, and MCP tool arguments.
- ProjectFolder: \\vanusdisk\Code\tester\\Tester_[admin]\ (description: Project Folder where the project files are located.)

Each RAG library below is exposed as its own MCP-style server. Use the server name and description to choose the correct RAG.
